summary: Tested Attendance Evaluation Engine V1. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: attendance section visible for ended appointments, summary cards showing correct counts, reclassify dropdown working, toast notifications appearing.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/attendance/{appointment_id} - Returns attendance records and summary (PASSED)
4. POST /api/attendance/evaluate/{appointment_id} - Returns 'Déjà évalué' for already evaluated (idempotency) (PASSED)
7. PUT /api/attendance/reclassify/{record_id} - Can change outcome to on_time (PASSED)
8. PUT /api/attendance/reclassify/{record_id} - Can change outcome to late (PASSED)
9. PUT /api/attendance/reclassify/{record_id} - Can change outcome to no_show (PASSED)
10. PUT /api/attendance/reclassify/{record_id} - Can change outcome to waived (PASSED)
19. UI: Attendance section visible for ended appointments (PASSED)
20. UI: Summary cards show correct counts (Présents, En retard, Absents, À vérifier, Dispensés) (PASSED)
21. UI: Reclassify dropdown opens and shows options (PASSED)
22. UI: Reclassification updates outcome and summary (PASSED)
23. UI: Toast notification 'Statut mis à jour' appears after reclassification (PASSED)
seed_data_creation: Used existing evaluated appointment 35df4fb0-91ac-4d6a-a56b-cfd6e06b4111 with participant Test Participant. Record was reclassified multiple times during testing (on_time, late, no_show, waived) and restored to on_time.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance evaluation engine fully tested. Classification rules: invited→waived, declined→waived, guarantee_released→waived, cancelled_in_time→waived, cancelled_late→no_show (decision_basis='cancelled_late'), accepted/accepted_pending_guarantee/accepted_guaranteed→manual_review. No auto on_time/late classification. auto_capture_enabled=false. APScheduler job runs every 10 min with 30 min grace window after appointment end. Login response uses 'access_token' field (not 'token'). Reclassification stores previous_outcome and refreshes appointment summary.

verified_features.pending_reviews_endpoint: GET /api/attendance/pending-reviews/list returns records needing manual review
verified_features.auth_required: All endpoints require valid JWT token
verified_features.ui_attendance_section: Visible on AppointmentDetail for ended appointments
verified_features.ui_summary_cards: Show correct counts for each outcome type
verified_features.ui_reclassify_dropdown: Opens with options, updates outcome on click

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints tested against real backend.
